subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Abdu'r-Razzaq
subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Great Horizon, and from the garment of its words wafted the sweet-scented fragrance of love for the Lord of Names and Attributes [3.5s]... ...As to thy question concerning the origin of creation. Know assuredly that God’s creation hath existed from eternity, and will continue to exist forever… Thou hast asked Me whether man, as apart from the Prophets of God…
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب بمنظر اکبر وارد و از قمیص کلماتش نفحات حب مالک اسما و صفات
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @universal language, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @Word of God and human limitations, @eternality vs. origination; creation from nothingness, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @creation of the world
